columns.description: The unique key for each order item.

columns.description: The corresponding order each order item belongs to

compiled_code:
with

source as (

    select * from shaman.raw.raw_items

),

renamed as (

    select

        ----------  ids
        id as order_item_id,
        order_id,
        sku as product_id

    from source

)

select * from renamed
